title: BABY CONNECTION - 211info
text: PARENTING NOW BABY CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Weekly drop-in program for families with new babies to meet other families, weigh babies, and consult with a lactation specialist to learn about feeding. 86 Centennial Loop Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Parents with infants up to age 1 Hours: Wednesday 11am-noon Email (541) 434-4343 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 434-4343 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD Bus #13 stops nearby twice per hour. Parking is available in a lot behind the building or on the street. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TEEN TRIPLE P INFORMATION SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PARENTING NOW
